column1: USE CASE RECOMMENDATIONS Just tell me what to pick Ranked by fit for each scenario — not by partnership or popularity. 💻 📚 Coding agents Knowledge wiki / RAG State across long sessions, multi-hop reasoning, Indexing a large, growing body of content and exact technical recall (ports, configs, error codes). surfacing the relevant slice at query time. 1 Hindsight — TEMPR's BM25 layer handles 1 Hindsight — reflect operation synthesizes exact keyword matches; structured entity across all stored knowledge; highest extraction built for technical memory; highest LongMemEval scores (91.4–94.6%) overall benchmarks 2 Supermemory — built for search-heavy 2 ByteRover — leads LoCoMo (multi-hop workloads; most generous free tier (1M 92.2%, temporal 94.4%); local CLI free; tokens); good LongMemEval score (81.6%) purpose-built for coding agents 3 Mem0 — solid recall + open Apache license 3 Mem0 — mature SDK, works well with tool- if you want to self-host the index calling patterns, self-hostable fallback ⚖ 🆓 All-around / default pick Free / zero cost Best option for most use cases when you don't You need memory working now with no billing have a strong constraint pushing you elsewhere. setup, or your budget is zero. 1 Mem0 — best SDK quality, largest 1 Holographic — built-in, MIT, local SQLite, community (51.4K stars), self-host option, zero config — operational in seconds Apache license — covers the most ground 2 Hindsight — full features locally for free; 2 Hindsight — MIT, fully local free, best MIT; best benchmarks at zero cost benchmarks — slightly more niche but 3 OpenViking — AGPL, self-host, no external stronger on technical workloads calls — free forever if you can run Docker
